query: SELECT id, primaryDomain, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pipelineOutput, '$.error') AS CHAR) as error_msg, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pipelineOutput, '$.stack') AS CHAR) as stack_trace, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pipelineOutput, '$.failedAt') AS CHAR) as failed_at FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status = 'failed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3
